hero.desc: Every medicine deserves a verified identity. MediVerify uses blockchain cryptography to instantly confirm authenticity — protecting millions of lives from counterfeit pharmaceuticals.

features_section.heading: Built for Trust
features_section.subheading: Six pillars of protection, working together
features_section.crypto_desc: SHA-256 hashing creates a tamper-proof fingerprint for every medicine batch.
features_section.blockchain_desc: Every verification is recorded on an immutable, transparent ledger.
features_section.offline_desc: Verify medicines using RSA digital signatures — even without internet.
features_section.ai_desc: Real-time anomaly detection flags suspicious scanning patterns instantly.
features_section.recall_desc: Privacy-preserving batch recalls protect public safety immediately.
features_section.global_desc: Built to scale across borders, languages, and regulatory systems.

process_section.heading: How It Works
process_section.subheading: From factory to your hands — in three simple steps
process_section.step1_desc: Manufacturers register each batch — a unique cryptographic hash and QR code are generated automatically.
process_section.step2_desc: Consumers scan the QR code with any phone camera — online or completely offline.
process_section.step3_desc: Get a verified result in under a second, with full supply chain history and risk analysis.

scan.title: Medicine Scanner Portal
scan.subtitle: Scanning System Active
scan.statusCardDesc: Align QR code within the frame or upload image
scan.uploadError: Could not read QR code from image. Please try a clearer image.
scan.desktopDesc: Align QR code within the frame, upload an image, or enter batch number manually
scan.offlineDesc: Cryptographic verification works even without internet.

common.offline_desc: No internet used. Verified locally using RSA-2048 digital signature.

tech_section.blockchain_desc: Smart contracts on Ethereum ensure tamper-proof medicine registration. Every batch hash is permanently immutable.
tech_section.crypto_desc: Military-grade SHA-256 hashing creates a unique fingerprint for every medicine batch — mathematically impossible to clone.
tech_section.frontend_desc: Lightning-fast Next.js frontend with server-side rendering ensures top Lighthouse scores and global CDN delivery.
tech_section.backend_desc: High-performance Express API with MongoDB Atlas scales to millions of verification requests per day with sub-50ms response.
